entities.name: PYAWT YWAR PUMP IRRIGATION PROJECT
entities.description: An irrigation scheme in Myanmar undergoing rehabilitation to improve infrastructure and crop production

entities.name: MYANMAR
entities.description: The country where the Pyawt Ywar Pump Irrigation Project is located

entities.name: MARKETABLE SURPLUS
entities.description: The portion of agricultural produce that exceeds the farmer's own consumption needs and is available for sale

entities.name: MARKETING CHANNELS
entities.description: The routes through which agricultural commodities move from the producer to the final consumer

entities.name: PRICE SPREAD
entities.description: The difference between the price paid by the consumer and the price received by the producer

entities.name: VALUE-ADDITION
entities.description: The process of enhancing a product's value through processing or other improvements

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL MARKETING SYSTEM
entities.description: The overall framework of activities involved in moving agricultural products from the farm to the market

entities.name: COMMODITY PRICES
entities.description: The market value of agricultural products

entities.name: DISTRESS SALES
entities.description: The sale of crops at low prices due to urgent financial needs or lack of storage

entities.name: PUBLIC STORAGE FACILITIES
entities.description: Government-provided infrastructure for storing agricultural produce to prevent distress sales

entities.name: DRY GRAINS
entities.description: A category of crops that are harvested and stored in a dry state

entities.name: FRUITS
entities.description: A category of perishable agricultural produce

entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: A category of perishable agricultural produce

entities.name: MARKETING EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A measure of how effectively the marketing system delivers products to consumers while ensuring fair returns to producers

entities.name: PLEDGE LOAN FACILITIES
entities.description: Credit provided to farmers using their stored crops as collateral

entities.name: GRAIN PROCESSING
entities.description: The method of transforming raw grains into processed products to increase value

entities.name: FARMER COLLECTIVES
entities.description: Groups of farmers who organize to improve their bargaining power and access to markets

entities.name: PRICE AWARENESS
entities.description: The level of knowledge farmers have regarding current market prices for their commodities

entities.name: COMMODITY RESEARCH
entities.description: The scientific study of agricultural commodities to improve production and marketing

entities.name: PRICE ADVOCACY
entities.description: Efforts to promote fair pricing and policies for agricultural producers
